evals.prompt: Test the website https://example.com — check if the homepage loads correctly, has proper navigation, and no broken images or JS errors. Give me a full QA report.
evals.expected_output: A structured QA report with discovery phase, use cases, test plan, execution results with screenshots, and an HTML report file. Should handle a simple static site gracefully.

evals.prompt: Протестируй сайт https://httpbin.org — проверь основные страницы, формы, и что всё работает. Сделай отчёт.
evals.expected_output: The skill should trigger on Russian-language prompt. Should discover httpbin.org pages, generate use cases for API testing tool, execute tests, and produce a report. Should handle a site with many endpoints gracefully.

evals.prompt: I have a local HTML project with an index.html file. Can you run QA tests on it to find any issues? The files are in the current directory under test-site/.
evals.expected_output: The skill should handle local file testing by serving files locally or using page.set_content(). Should generate appropriate use cases for a local project, run tests, and produce a report even without a live URL.
